T0574.title: MFA Fatigue
T0574.definition: A social-engineering tactic that repeatedly triggers MFA prompts until a user approves one by mistake.
T0574.description: MFA Fatigue is used to identify related risks, abuse patterns, control requirements, and operational signals in BREAK business-security analysis.
T0574.usageExample: Assess MFA Fatigue related exposure and define the corresponding controls.
